DartPoints’ Asheville data center is situated on a high plateau between the Great Smoky and Blue Ridge Mountains in the Biltmore Park Technology Center, approximately 10 miles from the NOAA National Climatic Data Center. Asheville, North Carolina is one of America’s safest weather cities.

name: DartPoints Greenville, SC - GSP1
notes:
25,800 sq ft
10,500 sq ft raised floor

DartPoints’ Greenville data center is an enterprise-class facility discreetly located in the Global Business Park, with easy access to I-85 and I-385. Greenville offers an ideal data center and disaster recovery location with its low risk of disasters, thriving IT industry, access to reliable and low cost utilities and highly-educated IT workforce. Located here since 2007, DartPoints has become a fixture in the growing Greenville business and technology community.

name: DartPoints Columbia, SC - CAE1
notes:
15,000 sq ft
5,000 sq ft raised floor

DartPoints’ Columbia data center is in the South Carolina Research Authority (SCRA) Innovation Center. The location, with easy access to the Columbia Statehouse, airport, University of South Carolina and within a two and a half hour drive from most anywhere in the state, is well situated to provide production and disaster recovery solutions to most businesses in South Carolina and elsewhere.

name: DartPoints Charleston, SC - CHS1
notes:
15,000 sq ft
5,000 sq ft raised floor

DartPoints’ North Charleston data center is located in the Palmetto Commerce Park near Ladson, in Charleston County, South Carolina. The business park is home to a handful of other high-tech facilities, including the Charleston County 911 emergency center. DartPoints’ data center is constructed to meet and exceed the conditions of the coastal region, both hurricanes and earthquakes. The location, with easy access to an airport, and just a short distance to downtown Charleston, is well situated to provide production and disaster recovery solutions to many of the businesses located in and around the Lowcountry.

name: NTT London 1 Data Center (LON1)
notes:
With up to 12,800 sqm of IT space, and a maximum IT load of 32 MW (64 MW once fully built out), the first phase of London 1 offers complete solutions for housing your IT and network systems in a secure, high-availability environment. We provide you with the
best possible physical and technical infrastructure supported by n+1 UPS systems, generator backup, as well as highly redundant cooling systems. London 1 holds multiple certifications and is connected to major carrier hubs and cloud networks, as well as to the
LINX. To validate hybrid cloud services and innovations faster and at lower cost, our Technology Experience Lab provide the perfect hosted ecosystem
in a live data center environment.

org_name: NTT DATA's Global Data Centers division
name: NTT Amsterdam 1 Data Center (AMS 1)
notes:
With a total of 8,000 sqm of IT space and an IT load of 20 MW in phase 1, Amsterdam 1 offers complete solutions for housing your IT and network systems in a secure, high-availability environment. We provide
you with the best possible physical and technical infrastructure supported by 2n UPS systems, generator backup as well as highly redundant cooling systems. Amsterdam 1 holds multiple certifications
and is connected to major carrier hubs and cloud networks as well as to the AMS-IX hub. To validate hybrid cloud services and innovations faster and at lower cost, our Technology Experience Labs provide the perfect hosted ecosystem in a live data
center environment.

name: LayerBridge Pipera
notes:
![LayerBridge](https://mserver.ro/assets/img/logo.png "LayerBridge")

**LayerBridge** is a registered company in Romania with Fiscal ID: 32101070 and Chamber of Commerce ID: J40/9776/2013, which offers datacenter services, such as [colocation](https://www.hetnix.com/colocation), [dedicated servers](https://www.hetnix.com/dedicated-servers) and [virtual servers](https://www.hetnix.com/kvm-servers) in Romania.

**LayerBridge** operates **ROPN-IX** at this location.

**ROPN-IX** or the **Romanian Open Internet Exchange**, is an open IXP located in Romania. It's main goal is to offer the possibility of interconnection for it's members free of charge* without membership or port fees or any other absurd costs.
For the moment, we only allow Electric (RJ45) 1 Gbps ports and 10GbE SFP+ Ports.

* For the moment, limited to 1 Gbps ports or 1x 10GbE port

Operating **AS60113** for the route servers.

* Joining to the IXP via a LayerBridge VM is possible: **[ROPN-IX](https://mserver.ro/cart.php?a=add&pid=164)**

notes:
![LayerBridge](https://mserver.ro/assets/img/logo.png "LayerBridge")

**LayerBridge** is a registered company in Romania with Fiscal ID: 32101070 and Chamber of Commerce ID: J40/9776/2013, which offers datacenter services, such as [colocation](https://www.hetnix.com/colocation), [dedicated servers](https://www.hetnix.com/dedicated-servers) and [virtual servers](https://www.hetnix.com/kvm-servers) in Romania.

**LayerBridge** operates **ROPN-IX** at this location.

**ROPN-IX** or the **Romanian Open Internet Exchange**, is an open IXP located in Romania. It's main goal is to offer the possibility of interconnection for it's members free of charge* without membership or port fees or any other absurd costs.
For the moment, we only allow Electric (RJ45) 1 Gbps ports and 10GbE SFP+ Ports.

* For the moment, limited to 1 Gbps ports or 1x 10GbE port.

Operating **AS60113** for the route servers.

* Joining to the IXP via a LayerBridge VM is possible: **[ROPN-IX](https://mserver.ro/cart.php?a=add&pid=164)**.

Move your IT systems or disaster recovery hot site to our commercial data center, where you can hand them off to our certified expert engineering team to manage all or a portion of your environment.

notes:
High-availability data centers form the backbone of digitalization. With the “DMO - Datacenter Münster Osnabrück”, the most modern data center in the region is being built at Münster Osnabrück Airport. Planning for the construction and operation of the regional data center has been underway since 2022. So that we can concentrate fully on our mission: Strengthening resilience through stability in digitalization. This was preceded by numerous considerations as to how the two parent companies can secure their own requirements for data center services and offer them more extensively due to customer requirements through additional capacities and resources. For as new as our company is, we are experienced in the competencies within the core areas. DMO GmbH combines the necessary qualities from the services of both parent companies.

In addition to high security standards and outstanding national and international connectivity, the focus is on sustainability and energy efficiency. As a subsidiary of items GmbH & Co. KG and TKRZ Stadtwerke GmbH, we can draw on over 45 years of IT expertise. DMO is a hub where the digital sovereignty and resilience of regional organizations and companies is sustainably strengthened.
